reusable_template_note: Per Codex 2026-05-22 F1 [high]: the docs (README.md §6/§7, docs/experiments/m6_real_fixed_debugger.md, docs/experiments/m7_real_llm_summary.md) instruct users to pass this config alongside a custom --diagnoser-name (e.g. stub-debugger-v1, my-debugger-v1). The runner's name-vs-config strict check (Codex 2026-05-15 F2) would otherwise reject those workflows. Setting this flag opts the config into name-override mode; the runner records BOTH the config's declared diagnoser_name AND the caller's --diagnoser-name in row metadata for audit. Canonical real-debugger configs (v1/v2/v3) do NOT set this flag, so their strict name match is preserved.
